text.title: Quality Attributes Framework Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the spec artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-quality-attributes.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

example.code: { "spec_id": "nfr-storefront-2026-05", "scenarios": [ { "id": "qa-perf-001", "source": "shopper", "stimulus": "submits search", "environment": "normal", "artefact": "search service", "response": "returns results", "measure": "p95 < 200ms at 500 RPS", "priority": "high", "difficulty": "medium" }, { "id": "qa-rel-001", "source": "payment provider", "stimulus": "returns 5xx", "environment": "degraded", "artefact": "checkout", "response": "retries with backoff + circuit-breaker after 5 failures", "measure": "checkout success rate >= 99% over 5min window", "priority": "high", "difficulty": "high" }, { "id": "qa-sec-001", "source": "external user", "stimulus": "submits malformed token", "environment": "normal", "artefact": "auth", "response": "rejects with 401 + logs attempt", "measure": "100% of malformed tokens logged + rejected", "priority": "high", "difficulty": "low" } ], "iso25010_coverage": [ "performance", "reliability", "security", "maintainability", "scalability" ], "sli_slo": [ { "sli": "p95 search latency", "slo": "< 200ms over 30d" }, { "sli": "checkout success rate", "slo": ">= 99% over 30d" } ], "tradeoff_conflicts": [ { "pair": "perf_vs_cost", "rule": "Accept p95 increase up to 220ms when monthly cost rises > 15%." }, { "pair": "security_vs_usability", "rule": "MFA required for admin only; shoppers use passwordless+device-pinning." } ], "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23" }
example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: spec_id pattern violation; <3 scenarios; scenario fields missing / enums wrong; <5 ISO categories; empty SLI/SLO; <2 tradeoff conflicts; version + date malformed.
